title: State-Space Model Forecasting Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the recursive process of forecasting using a State-Space Model, showing the interaction between the unobserved state and the observed data.
relationships: θ_{t-1} is updated to θ_t using the state transition equation
y_{t-1} is generated from θ_{t-1} via the observation equation
θ_t is used to forecast y_t
θ_t is projected to θ_{t+1} to forecast y_{t+1}
